pages.title: MiniChart (sparkline)
pages.summary: Single-series sparkline — line/bar with crosshair, tooltip, value formatter.

pages.title: SeriesChart (multi-dataset)
pages.summary: Multi-dataset line/bar/area — stacked-by-default bars, dynamic colors, legend toggle, animated setData.

pages.title: PieChart
pages.summary: Native pie + doughnut, slice labels, click drill-down, animated updates.

pages.title: CircularProgress
pages.summary: Sizes, variants, themes, multi-segment, and live setValue updates.

pages.title: MetricsMiniChartWidget
pages.summary: Backend-driven sparkline tiles with header, trending, and settings popover.
